config.title: Manual monitored area
config.help: Advanced fallback: create or update a TourRecords entry manually. The preferred workflow is now to import global records, then activate selected codes for the current tournament.

records.title: Tournament records
records.tournamentEmpty: No record snapshot activated for this tournament yet.

broken.title: Broken records
broken.actionsHelp: First check broken records, then update tournament 0 if you want to promote detected records into the global catalog.

import.title: Import records
import.help: Canonical CSV fields: recordCode, recordLabel, category, categoryName, total, maxScore, tieBreaker, holderName, holderClubOrCountry, place, date, isTeam, isMixed, isPara. Imports are stored in the global catalog with RtTournament = 0. recordCode maps to RtRecCode; recordLabel maps to RtRecDistance; holder data is serialized into RtRecExtra.

activation.title: Activate records for this tournament
activation.help: Copy selected global catalog records (RtTournament = 0) into the current tournament as a date-fixed snapshot. Ianseo ORIS printouts read the tournament snapshot.
activation.empty: No global record code available yet. Import records first.

current.areasHelp: Select the record areas to monitor. Selecting an area copies matching global records from tournament 0 to the current tournament. Deselecting removes the current tournament snapshot for that area.
current.noAreas: No record area available yet. Create one in the standings catalog view first.

standings.areasHelp: Create or remove global record areas. Deleting an area removes its global records, current tournament snapshots and monitoring rows.
standings.importExportHelp: Imports are stored in RecTournament with RtTournament = 0. Exports use the global catalog.
standings.confirmDelete: Delete record area {code} and every related record?

edit.title: Edit record
edit.help: The form uses the same canonical fields as CSV/JSON import and export. Holder, club/country and place are saved back into RtRecExtra.
